steps.title: Identify the contrasting relationship
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast: topographic maps show elevation above sea level, bathymetric maps show it below the sea.

steps.title: Match the transition to the opposition
steps.content:
“By contrast” is correct because it marks the opposition the passage sets up: bathymetric and topographic maps operate in opposite domains.

The others fail: “for example” suggests equivalence, “in conclusion” is inappropriate for introducing new information, and “afterward” implies temporal sequence rather than opposition.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
